provenance: Derived from the PUBLIC SAP Simplification Item Catalog and SAP Notes. This pack is NOT a copy or redistribution of SAP's Simplification Database. Each recipe cites its source item for reference only. Object/field/API names below are representative — verify them against your exact target release and SP before relying on a mapping.
notes: A pack is pinned to its target_releases because old->new mappings differ by release. Ship patterns incrementally via the catalog 'status' column (DRAFT patterns are excluded from auto-remediation by /sap-cc-remediate).
